title: task
description: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:377-404 - UdpHeader::write_to takes both 'payload_len: usize' and 'payload: &[u8]'. The length field in the UDP header uses payload_len (line 388), but the checksum calculation uses payload.len() (via udp_checksum at line 399). If caller passes mismatched values, the UDP header length will not match the checksum's pseudo-header length, producing an invalid packet. Fix: remove payload_len parameter and use payload.len() consistently, or add assertion/check that payload_len == payload.len().
